protocol.name: input_panel_unstable_v1

interface.name: zwp_input_panel_v1
interface.description: Only one client can bind this interface at a time.

request.name: get_input_panel_surface
request.description: Create a special surface designed for use as an input panel.

interface.name: zwp_input_panel_surface_v1
interface.description: This interface is implemented by servers that provide desktop-style user interfaces. It allows clients to associate a input panel surface with a wl_surface.

enum.name: position

description.summary: position of the input panel surface

enum.description: Specifies where the input panel surface should be placed.

request.name: set_toplevel

description.summary: set the surface as a toplevel surface

request.description: Set the input panel surface as a toplevel surface on the given output.
